title: MDN Web Docs
description: MDN Web Docs is one of the most trusted resources for learning HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and web APIs. It provides detailed explanations, examples, and browser compatibility information.

title: freeCodeCamp
description: A free platform offering full coding courses in web development, data science, and machine learning with hands-on projects and certifications.

title: GitHub
description: GitHub is a platform for hosting, sharing, and collaborating on code using Git. It is widely used for version control and open-source contributions.

title: Visual Studio Code
description: A lightweight yet powerful code editor by Microsoft with support for multiple programming languages, extensions, and debugging tools.

title: Postman
description: Postman is a popular tool for testing APIs, sending HTTP requests, and debugging backend services efficiently.

title: W3Schools
description: A beginner-friendly platform to learn web technologies like HTML, CSS, JavaScript with interactive examples and exercises.

title: GeeksforGeeks
description: A comprehensive platform for data structures, algorithms, interview preparation, and computer science concepts with coding examples.

title: Figma
description: Figma is a collaborative design tool used for UI/UX design, prototyping, and wireframing with real-time team collaboration.

title: Canva
description: An easy-to-use design tool for creating graphics, presentations, and social media content with ready-made templates.

title: CS50 by Harvard
description: One of the best introductory computer science courses covering C, Python, algorithms, and problem-solving with real-world applications.

title: Coursera
description: An online learning platform offering courses from top universities and companies in technology, business, and more.

title: Udemy
description: A platform with a wide range of paid and free courses on programming, design, and personal development.

title: Stack Overflow
description: A question-and-answer platform where developers solve coding problems and share knowledge.

title: LeetCode
description: A platform for practicing coding problems, preparing for technical interviews, and improving problem-solving skills.

title: HackerRank
description: Provides coding challenges and skill assessments for developers in various domains like algorithms, SQL, and AI.
